summary.zh: F1 赛车最显眼的空气动力学部件。倒置的翼面把气流“压”向天空，反作用力便把赛车按在赛道上；1968 年首次出现后，翼板逐步取代粗糙的试错，成为决定下压力与圈速的关键装置。
summary.en: The most visible aerodynamic parts of an F1 car. Inverted wings deflect airflow upward so the reaction pushes the car down; after their 1968 debut, wings evolved from crude experiments into the decisive tool for downforce and lap time.

content.zh:
飞机的机翼向上弯折，把气流向下推、把机身抬起。F1 赛车的翼板正相反：剖面上下颠倒，把气流向上引导，反作用力便把赛车压向地面。这个下压力（downforce）让轮胎能承受更大的侧向力，赛车因此能以更高速度过弯。

1968 年摩纳哥大奖赛，莲花 49 的鼻锥上第一次出现了这片小翼板，F1 的“翼飞冲天”时代由此开启。当年晚些时候，几乎所有赛车都装上了高置的大翼板，但当时对气动载荷的理解还很粗糙，接连发生翼板在直道上折断飞落的险情，规则随即对翼板的高度、宽度与结构强度作出严格限制。

今天的 F1 赛车前翼负责引导车头气流并产生前部下压力，尾翼则在车尾产生下压力并配合扩散器工作。翼片的剖面、缝隙、端板每一个细节都被反复优化；2022 年的新规则简化了前翼、强化了底板，但翼板仍是下压力与圈速的核心要素之一。
content.en:
An aircraft wing curves to push air down and lift the plane. An F1 wing is the same section inverted: it directs air upward, and the reaction pushes the car onto the track. That downforce lets the tyres take more lateral load, so the car corners faster.

At Monaco in 1968 a small wing appeared on the nose of the Lotus 49, opening F1's wings era. Within months nearly every car carried tall, high-mounted wings, but understanding of the loads was crude; wings snapped off on the straights and rules quickly limited their height, width and structural strength.

Today the front wing shapes the airflow around the nose and generates front-end downforce, while the rear wing produces rear downforce and works with the diffuser. Every detail of section, slot and endplate is optimised; the 2022 rules simplified the front wing and stressed the floor, but wings remain central to downforce and lap time.

heading.zh: 当代尾翼：高下压力规格
